description: Letter fragment in Arabic script. Seems to be a private letter but is written in formal/deferential terms ("... jamaʿa al-shaml bi-khidmatih...") and most of the text preserved consists of blessings. Reports that the children (al-ṣighār) are well.
description_he: שבר מכתב בכתב ערבי; נראה פרטי אך כתוב בנוסח רשמי/מכובד; מדווח שהילדים (אל-צ'ע'ר) בריאים
